Should it be Mercury, that aspects the Sun in a Sign of Venus, one will be skilful in drawing,
writing, poetry, authorship, singing etc. and will possess a good physique.
62

If Jupiter should lend his aspect to the Sun in Libra, or Taurus, the subject will have many foes
and friends, be a kings minister, will have beautiful eyes, be splendourous and will be a
pleased ruler.
When Venus aspects the Sun in Libra, or Taurus, one will be a king, or a kings minister, be
endowed with wife, wealth and pleasure galore, be wise and timid.
Saturn aspecting the Sun in fall, or in Taurus denotes, that the native will be mean, indolent, will
cohabit with aged women, will be wicked and will be troubled by diseases.
18-19. One who has the Sun in Gemini
will be a scholar, be sweet in speech, affectionate (particularly to ones offspring), will have good
conduct, be expert in profane knowledge and also in Sastras, be exceedingly affluent, liberal,
